name: Discovered Valley Ranch Dressing
directions: Place the garlic, salt, pepper, mayonnaise, sour cream, lime juice, buttermilk, and parsely in a food processor.
Puree for 1 minute, or until mixture is smooth and creamy.
Pour into a small bowl; stir in the chives.

name: No-Egg Caesar Dressing (Rachael Ray's)(Old Sub Sailor)
directions: Mix everything in blender.
enjoy.

name: Warm Walnut Dressing
directions: In medium saucepan combine oil and walnuts over medium heat until nuts are slightly brown.
Add remaining ingredients;reduce heat to low and simmer 5-7 minutes.

name: Cilantro-Lime Vinaigrette Recipe
directions: Put everything but the cilantro into a blender and puree until smooth.
Stir in the cilantro, then taste and adjust seasonings if needed.
Shake before serving.

name: Favourite Salad Dressing
directions: Mix all ingredients together well.
Taste. If needed add more mustard or maple syrup.

name: Strawberry Dressing
directions: Place ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Store in a jar in the refrigerator.

name: Pineapple Cream Dressing
directions: Whip egg white to very soft peak.
Combine all ingredients except the egg white and cream in the top of a double boiler and cook until thickened.
Fold in egg white and cool.
Just before serving, fold in whipped cream.

name: Sour Cream Salad Dressing
directions: Mix first four ingredients; add vinegar and water and cook in a double boiler until thickened, stirring constantly.
Pour over egg yolk and butter, return to heat and cook a few minutes longer.
Cool in refrigerator; fold in sour cream.

name: Cucumber  Sauce
directions: Peel and grate cucumber.
Squeeze out excess juice.
Place all ingredients in a medium size bowl.
Mix well and Cover.
Place in refrigerator for a least 1 hour.
I usually make this the night before so that all the flavors have a chance to meld.

name: Ranch Dressing - Worth the Work
directions: Finely mince the parsley leaves and chives.
Put in a 1 to 1 1/2 quart mixing bowl.
Pulverize with a mortar/pestle the dry leek herb, celery seed, dry savory herb, and salt
Wisk in the Liquid Whey and Buttermilk, pepper, dry mustard, and dry herbs.
Wisk in the mayonnaise.
makes 2 cups - 32 servings.
Serve chilled.

name: Creamy Dill Dressing
directions: Mix mustard and yogurt together. Blend in vinegar, olive oil and dill. Mix well. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.

name: Roasted Garlic Vinaigrette
directions: Preheat the oven to 350°F
Slice off the top of the garlic bulb, just enough to barely expose the garlic inside each clove.
Place the bulb in an ovenproof dish and drizzle with olive oil.
Place the dish, uncovered, in the oven and cook the garlic until it is golden brown and soft, about 15 to 20 minutes.
Let cool.

When the roasted garlic is cool enough to handle, squeeze the pulp from 6 of the cloves and mash with a mortar and pestle, or with a fork. (Store the remaining cloves in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.)
Put the garlic in a food processor and add the mustard, vinegar, salt and pepper and puree.
Slowly add the olive oil and stock through the feed tube, and puree until the vinaigrette is creamy. If it is too thick add a teaspoon of stock until the consistency is correct.
Add the shallots and tarragon. Adjust the salt and pepper to taste.

name: Creamy Herb Dressing
directions: Whiz in a food processor until smooth, adding more lemon juice if a thinner consistency is desired.

For herbs, I use whatever's growing in the potted herb garden on the front porch, or whatever fresh herbs are affordable at the supermarket. This dressing is especially good with dill, or with a mix of herbs. I use no more than three different herbs so that the herb flavors stay distinct. Favorite combinations: mint, cilantro, parsley; basil, oregano, thyme; tarragon, dill, parsley.

name: Italian Vinaigrette
directions: Combine in bowl and blend. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Drizzle on sandwiches, if desired.

name: Diet Blue Cheese Cheese Salad Dressing
directions: Mix together and chill before serving.
Enjoy.

name: Honey Mustard - Splenda
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve!
Enjoy!
